title: Burgos, Castile and León — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Burgos, Castile and León: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Burgos is a city in Castile and León with a population of 176,000. A historic Castilian city with a magnificent Gothic cathedral on the French Way of Santiago and excellent local cuisine.

Last updated: July 14, 2026
